channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19805] Repeated client mount/umount eventually causes EEXISTS
item.description:
Running repeated mount/umount cycle (see repro.sh)

 

[611576.769508] sysfs: cannot create duplicate filename '/devices/virtual/bdi/fs-ffffa08a8a808000'
[611576.770824] CPU: 0 PID: 2463002 Comm: mount.lustre Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE     -------- -  - 4.18.0-553.76.1.el8_lustre.ddn17.x86_64 #1
[611576.772666] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM/RHEL, BIOS 1.16.1-1.el9 04/01/2014
[611576.773646] Call Trace:
[611576.774475]  dump_stack+0x41/0x60
[611576.775120]  sysfs_warn_dup.cold.4+0x17/0x2a
[611576.775880]  sysfs_create_dir_ns+0xb3/0xe0
[611576.776506]  kobject_add_internal+0xc2/0x290
[611576.777141]  kobject_add+0x7d/0xb0
[611576.777672]  ? _cond_resched+0x15/0x30
[611576.778244]  device_add+0x12a/0x800
[611576.778886]  device_create_groups_vargs+0xe0/0xf0
[611576.779594]  device_create+0x49/0x70
[611576.780134]  bdi_register_va.part.18+0x5e/0x290
[611576.781017]  ? wb_init+0x220/0x300
[611576.781558]  super_setup_bdi_name+0x79/0xe0
[611576.782390]  ll_fill_super+0xb50/0x16d0 [lustre]
[611576.783202]  ? lustre_start_mgc+0xa9f/0x2240 [obdclass]
[611576.784123]  ? kfree+0x22e/0x250
[611576.784638]  ? lustre_start_mgc+0xa9f/0x2240 [obdclass]
[611576.785467]  lustre_fill_super+0x8d/0x3d0 [lustre]
[611576.786208]  ? ll_alloc_inode+0x110/0x110 [lustre]
[611576.786935]  mount_nodev+0x49/0xa0
[611576.787671]  legacy_get_tree+0x27/0x50
[611576.788361]  vfs_get_tree+0x25/0xc0
[611576.788895]  do_mount+0x2e9/0x980
[611576.789517]  ksys_mount+0xbe/0xe0
[611576.790033]  __x64_sys_mount+0x21/0x30
[611576.790614]  do_syscall_64+0x5b/0x1a0
[611576.791285]  entry_SYSCALL_64_after_hwframe+0x66/0xcb
[611576.792137] RIP: 0033:0x7ff6dd3fce3e
[611576.792696] Code: 48 8b 0d 4d 60 39 00 f7 d8 64 89 01 48 83 c8 ff c3 66 2e 0f 1f 84 00 00 00 00 00 90 f3 0f 1e fa 49 89 ca b8 a5 00 00 00 0f 05 <48> 3d 01 f0 ff ff 73 01 c3 48 8b 0d 1a 60 39 00 f7 d8 64 89 01 48
[611576.795231] RSP: 002b:00007ffd5df89188 EFLAGS: 00000206 ORIG_RAX: 00000000000000a5
[611576.796306] RAX: ffffffffffffffda RBX: 0000000000000000 RCX: 00007ff6dd3fce3e
[611576.797314] RDX: 0000000000416eb9 RSI: 00007ffd5df8f550 RDI: 0000000000d64920
[611576.798338] RBP: 00007ffd5df8f550 R08: 0000000000d65850 R09: 00007ff6dd552c80
[611576.799346] R10: 0000000001000000 R11: 0000000000000206 R12: 0000000001000000
[611576.800357] R13: 00007ffd5df8c530 R14: 0000000000416eb9 R15: 00000000fffffff5
[611576.801384] kobject_add_internal failed for fs-ffffa08a8a808000 with -EEXIST, don't try to register things with the same name in the same directory.
[611576.806453] LustreError: 2463002:0:(super25.c:192:lustre_fill_super()) llite: Unable to mount <unknown>: rc = -17
item.summary: Repeated client mount/umount eventually causes EEXISTS

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
Hi paf0186, We are seeing this issue in MTFL testing as well, randomly tenant creation fails with this error. Generally, this issue is seen when multiple tenants are already created and destroyed and system is old enough and MTFL commands having mount in its step like tenant creation, quota creation/setting, emf tenant update (converting non LQA tenant to LQA tenants) and finally sometimes in external client mount.

Automation failures generating failed emf commands in a list, we can see the frequency (based on command -id) of above-mentioned operations are failing 

33  | api  | Add Nids to Tenant ett918_Ma0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:27:51+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:27:51+0000
 36  | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:27:56+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:28:24+0000
 45  | api  | Add Nids to Tenant ett940_dVz                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:33:21+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:33:21+0000
 60  | api  | Create Tenant invalid1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:38:21+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:38:54+0000
 61  | api  | Create Tenant invalid2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:38:56+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:39:29+0000
 62  | api  | Create Tenant invalid3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:39:30+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:40:04+0000
 64  | api  | Create Tenant nid1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:40:40+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:41:14+0000
 65  | api  | Create Tenant quota1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | failed    | 2026-02-03 04:41:15+0000 | 2026-02-03 04:41:18+0000
 137 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 07:52:59+0000 | 2026-02-03 07:53:25+0000
 143 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 07:54:04+0000 | 2026-02-03 07:54:30+0000
 149 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 07:55:12+0000 | 2026-02-03 07:55:40+0000
 157 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 07:57:31+0000 | 2026-02-03 07:57:58+0000
 163 | api  | Add Bans to Tenant ett1084_RE0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | failed    | 2026-02-03 07:59:31+0000 | 2026-02-03 07:59:31+0000
 166 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 07:59:38+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:00:06+0000

 195 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:08:57+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:09:22+0000
 198 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:09:29+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:09:59+0000
 204 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:10:45+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:11:15+0000
 207 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:11:21+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:11:47+0000

 219 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:13:45+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:14:13+0000
 222 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:14:19+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:14:46+0000
 227 | api  | Create Tenant ett1087_y02                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:15:30+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:15:33+0000
 231 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:38:57+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:39:23+0000
 258 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:49:52+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:50:21+0000
 270 | api  | Set Quota for Tenant ett1507_Kod                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:51:25+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:51:55+0000
 271 | api  | Upgrade Tenant ett1507_Kod                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:51:28+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:51:29+0000
 285 | api  | Create Tenant ett1465_MpX                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:56:42+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:56:44+0000
 287 | api  | Mounting clients                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:57:13+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:57:41+0000
 293 | api  | Set Quota for Tenant ett1466_ClU                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 08:59:03+0000 | 2026-02-03 08:59:03+0000
 316 | api  | Set Quota for Tenant ett1519_iVC                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | failed    | 2026-02-03 09:08:20+0000 | 2026-02-03 09:08:20+0000

From the log:

2026-02-03T09:08:20.695967+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf-manager[678450]: #033[32m INFO#033[0m #033[2memf_lib_state_machine::orchestrator::executor#033[0m#033[2m:#033[0m Running: Step Running mountpoint -q /lustre/mtfl.ett1519_iVC || mount -t lustre 172.16.0.22@tcp,172.16.0.23@tcp:172.16.0.20@tcp,172.16.0.21@tcp:/es01a /lustre/mtfl.ett1519_iVC on es-200nvxe-vm00
2026-02-03T09:08:20.706371+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf-node-manager[681612]: #033[32m INFO#033[0m #033[2memf_node_manager::utils::rpc#033[0m#033[2m:#033[0m START_ASYNC_RPC(c8e10b6b-67c1-4564-b393-2e9f8470fe7d) --> `mountpoint -q /lustre/mtfl.ett1519_iVC || mount -t lustre 172.16.0.22@tcp,172.16.0.23@tcp:172.16.0.20@tcp,172.16.0.21@tcp:/es01a /lustre/mtfl.ett1519_iVC` as root
2026-02-03T09:08:20.753162+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 kernel: sysfs: cannot create duplicate filename '/devices/virtual/bdi/es01a-ffff9d7076131800'

2026-02-03T09:08:20.799430+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf-manager[678450]: #033[32m INFO#033[0m #033[2memf_lib_state_machine::orchestrator::executor#033[0m#033[2m:#033[0m Command 316 finished executing
2026-02-03T09:08:20.799488+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf-manager[678450]: #033[32m INFO#033[0m #033[2memf_lib_state_machine::orchestrator::cancelation#033[0m#033[2m:#033[0m Attemping cancelation of command 316 (Steps: 1)
2026-02-03T09:08:21.669077+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf[1336031]: Command 316 Failed after 0 seconds
2026-02-03T09:08:21.675480+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 systemd[1]: session-2346.scope: Succeeded.

Below is log of tenant creation failing during mount to /lustre/mtfl.client with:

kobject_add_internal failed for es01a-ffff97ece19ac800 with -EEXIST, don't try to register things with the same name in the same directory. 

2026-01-27T06:58:38.982903+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf-node-manager[590101]: #033[32m INFO#033[0m #033[2memf_node_manager::utils::rpc#033[0m#033[2m:#033[0m START_ASYNC_RPC(e4d4c56b-66d0-4154-812e-62f922e483b4) --> `lctl nodemap_add ett1091_QJM` as root

2026-01-27T06:58:39.429157+00:00 es-200nvxe-vm00 emf-node-manager[590101]: #033[32m INFO#033[0m #033[2memf_node_manager::utils::rpc#033[0m#033[2m:#033[0m START_ASYNC_RPC(8752833c-d51a-4b4a-b761-9cbbb16d6579) --> `lctl nodemap_set_fileset --name ett1091_QJM --fileset /tenants/ett1091_QJM` as root
